title: Game Model
description: Experience strategic depth through deck-building mastery, turn-based tactical warfare, and competitive progression.

pillars.title: Tactical Battles
pillars.description: Plan every move carefully in turn-based duels where timing, positioning, and spell synergy decide victory.

pillars.title: Collectible Cards
pillars.description: Unlock, collect, and build with rare cards, powerful abilities, and unique combinations across multiple playstyles.

pillars.title: Ranked Climb
pillars.description: Rise through competitive ladders, refine your strategy, and prove your mastery in the Kingdom of Arcane.
